title: Norway Coordinated Register Notification (Samordnet registermelding) — Main Form
description: Brønnøysundregistrene's (the Brønnøysund Register Centre) form BR-1010B, "Samordnet registermelding – Hovedblankett" ("Coordinated Register Notification – Main Form"), used to register a business in the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities (Enhetsregisteret) and, as applicable, the Register of Business Enterprises (Foretaksregisteret), the NAV Register of Employers and Employees (Aa-registeret), Statistics Norway's Register of Businesses and Enterprises, the Register of Foundations (Stiftelsesregisteret), and the Norwegian Tax Administration's register of non-personal taxpayers. A single "coordinated" form covers every legal entity type Enhetsregisteret accepts — from a sole proprietorship (enkeltpersonforetak) through public limited companies (ASA), foundations, cooperatives, and public-sector bodies — as well as changes, mergers, demergers, and deletions for an already-registered business. This document describes the form only; it does not submit anything, and does not imply Norwegian government endorsement.

source.documentRef: BR-1010B-2026, "Samordnet registermelding – Hovedblankett" ("Coordinated Register Notification – Main Form"), 6 pages

verification.notes: See this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing, extraction, and disclosed-judgment-call record (GOV-2316).

Whether this section 12 (simpler entities: owner/managing director/business manager) or section 19's board/participants table applies is entity-type-dependent; GovSchema v0.3 has no "at least one of these two sections" cross-field primitive, so neither is modelled as unconditionally required -- disclosed in VERIFICATION.md rather than guessed.

fields.name: contactPerson1Role
fields.label: Contact person 1: role
fields.description: Innehaver (owner) always applies to a sole proprietorship. If the business has a managing director and/or a business manager, state this too. For a Norwegian-registered foreign enterprise (NUF) with a place of business in Norway: state any managing director and/or owner in Norway. For a VAT-liable NUF with no place of business in Norway: state a Norwegian representative. If the business has no owner, managing director, board member, or business manager: state another contact person.
